title: chrysanthemum montanum var. corsicum
intro: Chrysanthemum montanum var. corsicum, also known as Corsican chrysanthemum, is a plant species within the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region and the western coast of Europe. The medicinal properties of Chrysanthemum montanum var. corsicum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Chrysanthemum montanum var. corsicum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
